ddls:
CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* The class name of the collection */,
  "interfaces" TEXT /* Interfaces implemented by the collection */,
  "elements" TEXT /* Characteristics of the elements in the collection */,
  "sorted" INTEGER /* Whether the collection is sorted or not */,
  "blocking" INTEGER /* Whether the collection operations are blocking or not */,
  "thread_safety" INTEGER /* Whether the collection is thread-safe */,
  "concurrent_access" INTEGER /* Whether the collection supports concurrent access */,
  "performance_implications" TEXT /* Performance implications of using the collection */,
  "use_cases" TEXT /* Common use cases for the collection */,
  "size_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum size of the collection, if applicable */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the Java collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection the characteristic applies to */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the characteristic */,
  "performance_implication" TEXT /* Performance implications of the characteristic */,
  "example_usage" TEXT /* Example of how the characteristic is used in code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_characteristics_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage scenario */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection used in the scenario */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the system module that uses the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of how the collection is used in the module */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics observed when using the collection in the module */,
  "trade-offs" TEXT /* Trade-offs associated with using the collection in the module */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the usage scenario was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_usage_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id")
)
